subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Thou seest me standing firm in service to Thy Cause, seated before Thy presence, transcribing Thy verses with upraised hand [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ترانی قائما علی خدمه امرک و جالسا امام وجهک محررا آیاتک و مرتفعه ید
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
